name: Brownington Central
description: Brownington Central is a place to play pickleball in Brownington, VT. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Gardner Memorial Park Recreation Area
description: Come play pickleball at Gardner Memorial Park Recreation Area in Newport, VT! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Irasburg Village School
description: Come play pickleball at Irasburg Village School in Irasburg, VT! There are 4 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Newport Municipal Gym
description: Newport Municipal Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newport, VT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Prouty Beach Tennis Courts
description: Prouty Beach Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newport, VT. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
